mapper.select: SELECT A.LICE_CD , A.LICE_TITLE , A.LICE_FILE_KEY , A.SORT , A.USE_YN , F.FILE_NM , F.SAVE_FILE_NM , F.SAVE_PATH , F.FILE_SIZ , F.FILE_EXTN , CONCAT(#{uploadBaseDir}, F.SAVE_PATH, F.SAVE_FILE_NM) AS FILE_FULL_PATH FROM TB_LICE A INNER JOIN TB_UPLD_FILE F ON A.LICE_FILE_KEY = F.UPLD_FILE_CD AND F.FILE_SEQ = 1 AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT ASC
